narration: Astrocytes are star-shaped cells in your brain, but they do way more than just look pretty.
visual_description: Context visual: Astrocytes are star-shaped cells in your brain, but they do way more than just look pretty.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Astrocytes are star-shaped cells in your brain, but they do way more than just look pretty.

narration: They regulate blood flow, support neurons, and maintain the blood-brain barrier.
visual_description: Escalation visual: They regulate blood flow, support neurons, and maintain the blood-brain barrier.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: They regulate blood flow, support neurons, and maintain the blood-brain barrier.
